prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5483名→5557名→6992名→6629名→12510名。2021–2024年位次在5500–7000名区间窄幅波动，2025年出现大幅后移约5881名，主要受物理必选专业组录取位次拉低影响，2025年基准位次约12510名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021年36人、2022年33人、2023年34人、2024年32人、2025年37人、2026年37人。2025年较2024年扩招5人，2026年与2025年持平，计划总量稳定，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中师范大学为教育部直属211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第53名，近年排名稳定在46–58名区间，属于国内师范类顶尖院校之一，综合实力强劲；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏正面，主要源于81岁博士毕业等正面事件，无负面舆情记录；抖音综合热度排名第89位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现显著报考关注升温信号；2021–2025年均无投档断档或异常记录；教育学获评A+（全国顶尖），中国史、心理学、政治学、马克思主义理论获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科。教育学A+为该校王牌，对师范类考生有较强吸引力；中国史A-对应历史学类招生专业，政治学A-对应政治学类招生专业。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业2024年热度指数55.84（分化观望），社会评价趋于理性；计算机类（67.8，推荐）、电子信息类（76.86，高热推荐）等工科专业热度较高，该校相关专业组报考竞争可能升温。天津市考生总数持续增长：2021年54025人→2025年71938人→2026年约82000人（增幅约14%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；华中师范大学位于湖北省武汉市，在天津市招生规模较小（约32–37人/年），非本地高校，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移后的回弹预期、2026年天津市考生总数显著增加（约+14%）带来的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏正面可能吸引更多报考，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移（更易进），预测最低位次约12310名，区间11810–12810名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 历史学类（含开沅国家拔尖学生培养基地班等）
- 中国语言文学类（含汉语言文学国家拔尖学生培养基地班等）
- 数学类（含英才班、未来卓越教师实验班等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学（国家拔尖学生培养基地班）
- 化学类（含英才班、未来卓越教师实验班等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息安全等）
- 电子信息类（含智能装备与系统、集成电路等）
- 政治学类（含计算政治实验班、国际组织实验班等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学类（含涉外法治人才实验班、法学经济学交叉班）
- 教育学（创新实验班）
- 教育学类（含教育学、融合教育等）
- 信息资源管理（含数据基座基地班）
- 管理科学与工程类（含信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约12310名，区间11810–12810名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档专业为主力填报（计算机类、电子信息类、政治学类），一档专业（历史学类、中国语言文学类、数学类）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（教育学类、法学类、信息资源管理）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（11810名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（12810名附近）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the Comprehensive category in Tianjin were approximately 5483 → 5557 → 6992 → 6629 → 12510. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 5500–7000 range, but in 2025 there was a significant drop of about 5881 places, mainly due to the lower admission rankings of the Physics-mandatory major group, setting a baseline ranking of about 12510 for 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the Comprehensive category in Tianjin was 36 in 2021, 33 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 32 in 2024, 37 in 2025, and 37 in 2026. Compared to 2024, 2025 saw an increase of 5 students, while 2026 remains the same as 2025. The total plan is stable, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central China Normal University is a directly affiliated 211 Project and Double First-Class university under the Ministry of Education. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 53rd, with recent rankings stable in the 46–58 range. It is one of the top normal universities in China, with strong overall strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate, with no negative public opinion records. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no significant signs of increased application attention. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission gaps or anomalies. Education is rated A+ (top in the country), while Chinese History, Psychology, Political Science, and Marxist Theory are rated A-, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above. Education A+ is the university's flagship, strongly attracting normal university applicants. Chinese History A- corresponds to the History major, and Political Science A- corresponds to the Political Science major.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Normal/Education majors was 55.84 (differentiated wait-and-see), with social evaluation becoming more rational. Engineering majors such as Computer Science (67.8, recommended) and Electronic Information (76.86, highly recommended) have high popularity, and the competition for related major groups at this university may heat up. The total number of Tianjin examinees continues to grow: 54,025 in 2021 → 71,938 in 2025 → approximately 82,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 14%). The expansion of the examinee pool intensifies overall competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, with a small enrollment scale in Tianjin (about 32–37 students per year). It is not a local university, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound expectation after the significant ranking drop in 2025, the notable increase in Tianjin examinees in 2026 (about +14%) intensifying competition, and the slightly positive reputation potentially attracting more applicants, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 12,310, with a range of 11,810–12,810.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- History (including Kaiyuan National Top Student Training Base Class, etc.)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature National Top Student Training Base Class, etc.)
- Mathematics (including Elite Class, Future Outstanding Teacher Experimental Class, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (National Top Student Training Base Class)
- Chemistry (including Elite Class, Future Outstanding Teacher Experimental Class, etc.)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Intelligent Equipment and Systems, Integrated Circuits, etc.)
- Political Science (including Computational Politics Experimental Class, International Organization Experimental Class, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Law (including International Rule of Law Talent Experimental Class, Law and Economics Cross Class)
- Education (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Education (including Education, Integrated Education, etc.)
- Information Resource Management (including Data Base Base Class)
- Management Science and Engineering (including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 12,310, with a range of 11,810–12,810. If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Political Science) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (History, Chinese Language and Literature, Mathematics) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Education, Law, Information Resource Management) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11,810), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 12,810), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as backups.
